Specialty Coffee

Always
rotating.

Carefully sourced beans from roasters we love, rotating with the season. Taste three side by side with the Filter Taster, or just ask the bar for today's pour.

A rotating cast of roasters and single origins. Build your own Filter Taster and compare three.

The one that
never rotates.

While the fan above changes with the season, House stays put: Papua New Guinea (Okapa), washed · milk chocolate, caramel & hazelnut. Our everyday espresso, every day.

Reviews

Worth the
wrong turns.

4.9 ★★★★★Google Reviews · Read more →

★★★★★

"What a gorgeous little hidden gem. My flat white was perfectly made, so smooth, and the latte art was next level. Tried the Einspanner matcha and it was delicious and well balanced."

Nene via Google

★★★★★

"Being able to taste and compare different coffees was such a great experience. The latte art was beautiful and made with real care, and the pastries paired perfectly. Highly recommend."

Haruka via Google

★★★★★

"A cosy little cafe nestled down the back of a laneway. We ordered their famous Einspanner and it superseded every expectation, so soothingly creamy. One of our favourite places for matcha."

JayJay Truviews via Google
